name: blog-marketing
description: Generate and optimize blog posts. The roadtrip-blogger agent writes complete, non-duplicating North American road-trip posts in your site's own format (three-level dedup gate via a coverage ledger). The blog-seo-geo skill optimizes a local post (HTML or Markdown) for SEO and GEO (AI-citation readiness) by orchestrating aaron-marketing skills: diagnose, rewrite content blocks, run a Gemini-targeted GEO pass, build head markup, write the file back safely (fail-closed integrity checks, number-fabrication guard), and emit a change report. Deterministic parsing/write-back is handled by dependency-free Python scripts; editorial judgment is delegated to aaron-marketing sub-skills.
